testcase.name: testExecutorRejectsEventsAfterShutdown
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.346 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor initialized with cached thread pool executor 20:25:03.347 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 20:25:03.347 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 20:25:03.347 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully 20:25:03.347 [main] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Executor is not running, rejecting event: command 20:25:03.347 [main] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Executor already shut down

testcase.name: testHandleFeishuEventReturns200Ok

testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.373 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor initialized with cached thread pool executor 20:25:03.373 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 20:25:03.373 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Submitting async event processing: type=CLI, group=test-group, user=test-user 20:25:03.373 [pool-63-thread-1] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Processing event in virtual thread: type=CLI, event=command 20:25:03.373 [pool-63-thread-1] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- CLI session created: test-session-id 20:25:03.373 [pool-63-thread-1] ERROR tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Error processing webhook event: type=CLI, group=test-group, error=Test exception java.lang.RuntimeException: Test exception at tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl.processEventInternal(WebhookEventExecutorImpl.java:124) at tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl.lambda$processAsync$0(WebhookEventExecutorImpl.java:93) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:539) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:840) 20:25:03.873 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 20:25:03.874 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully

Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 20:25:03.902 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- CLI command received: test command 20:25:03.902 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Submitting async event processing: type=CLI, group=cli-session, user=cli-user 20:25:03.902 [pool-83-thread-1] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Processing event in virtual thread: type=CLI, event=command 20:25:03.902 [pool-83-thread-1] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- CLI session created: test-session-id 20:25:03.902 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 20:25:03.902 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully

testcase.name: testHandleSlackCallbackParsesApproveAction
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.903 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor initialized with cached thread pool executor 20:25:03.903 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 20:25:03.903 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: not configured, Slack secret: not configured 20:25:03.903 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Received Slack interactive callback 20:25:03.903 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Slack signature verification skipped (no secret configured) 20:25:03.904 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Slack callback parsed: session=worker-session-123, toolCallId=tool-call-456, approved=true 20:25:03.904 [SlackCallback-worker-session-123] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Successfully processed Slack callback resume for session worker-session-123 20:25:03.904 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 20:25:03.904 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully

testcase.name: testHandleFeishuCallbackSignatureSkippedWhenNoSecret
testcase.system-out: 20:25:03.910 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor initialized with cached thread pool executor 20:25:03.910 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: not configured, Slack secret: configured 20:25:03.910 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Received Feishu interactive callback 20:25:03.910 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Feishu signature verification skipped (no secret configured) 20:25:03.910 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Feishu callback parsed: session=worker-123, toolCallId=call-456, approved=true 20:25:03.910 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Submitting async event processing: type=FEISHU, group=worker-123, user=callback-user 20:25:03.910 [pool-91-thread-1] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Processing event in virtual thread: type=FEISHU, event=callback 20:25:03.911 [pool-91-thread-1] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Unhandled event type: callback 20:25:03.911 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 20:25:03.911 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully 20:25:03.911 [FeishuCallback-worker-123] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Successfully processed Feishu callback resume for session worker-123
